biography:
Molly Gordon (born December 6, 1995) is an American actress, screenwriter and director. She has appeared in the drama TV series Animal Kingdom (2016–2018), as well as the comedy films Life of the Party (2018), Booksmart (2019), and Good Boys (2019). In 2023, she co-directed, co-wrote and starred in the musical comedy film Theater Camp, and took on a recurring role as Claire on the FX series The Bear (2023–present).
